channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. — 38 replies — 74.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted.

Open thread • Replies: 38 • Updated: 2026-03-05 04:59 UTC

OP

Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.

Instead Chainlink keeps the scam going for years and years, with new "partnerships" and "news" and "integrations", all while the token does nothing. They give just enough breadcrumbs to keep the baggies holding on desperately for a pump, and they probably keep buying even more LINK tokens as well ensuring they remain poor forever as they wait for a "mega moon" that never comes.

In that way it's actually a more brutal and evil scam, but still funny. It's crazy because all they had to do was buy Bitcoin... or gold, or the S&P 500, or literally anything else.

Early replies (first 3)

61931782
fuck all stinkies :}
hate em all hate em all
think they SUUUUCK xD

61931907
>>61931684
>At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.
Wait a minute. You're telling me I've DCA'd into a scam all these years?

61931931
thanks for keeping this a Chainlink board

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61932038
>>61931958
Just keep doing what your doing. Sit in your chair in the corner and keep informing me of my financial performance on an hourly basis so that I dont need to open up the app. Thanks.

61932060
This site is shit now. I'm on here less and less. What a rubbish thread. Twitter completely ate /biz's lunch.

61932062
>>61931684
what's the deal with the LINK obsession? there are hundreds of bad cryptos to invest in, like every single one of them. why the singling out? reads like a psyop.

61932076
>>61932038
ok

61932086
>>61932062
Because linkies were smug. They fudded their own token endlessly to keep normies away from making it. We had to spend years listening to their grandiose scenarios, their $81k prediction and their lack of self awareness. Now linkies will spend years listening how bad they failed. Their hubris was their fall. Adem won.

61932119
>>61932062
>reads like a psyop.
/biz is a psyop board ran by banking cartel flunkies, anything that gets fudded here I assume is a threat to the bank niggers and I dive in out of spite

61932122
>>61932086
this
we fuddies are the warriors of justice
we will see to it that the linkie hubris is punished for all eternity
might i remind you all that one of link's first memes was "are nolinkers even human?"

61932285
>>61932086
ill agree with this in about 10 more years if link never hits 100

for the next 10 years ill buy link tho. should pump to 11 some day ,

61932295
yikes

61932298
chainlink will be sub $5 this year. let that sink in.

61932327
>>61932298
If it does I will put usd 5 million in, just to spite you, you insufferable fuck. Ffs. Give it a rest.

61932513
>>61932327
>i-i-i'm a bajillionaire....
cope, stinky

61932516
>>61932513
Haha, you don't understand. It doesn't matter what i do or do not have. Anons do.

61932522
If we could be guaranteed that link would moon to $500 tomorrow but 10% of us would be injected with AIDS. Would you guys vote for that happening?

61932558
Fuddies know the second Link crosses $1,000 they will immediately be hunted and tortured across the globe. It’s quite literally in their best interest to keep this shit low.

61932671
It has been a brutal hold and I'm better off focusing on a high income career than waiting for this shit. I could have semi retired in 2021 but didn't sell.

61932731
Crazy how these threads are always 95 percent the same brown fuddie cockroach hopping ids and replying to himself to give the illusion of consensus.
Like there's no point whatsoever. Everyone's on x where you're salty and blocked and nothing posted here changes or does anything lmao. A million hours wasted on nothing

Herbs

61932783
>>61932731
Crazy how you keep seasoning dozens and even hundreds of threads after all these years and yet you keep coming back to them like a pig at the trough.
One might even be liberal enough to say that you keep coming back to them as if you were a paypig at the trough.

61932904
>>61932558
Link will be $999 in 2126 and fudies WILL ROPE

>just hold for a century bruv

61932907
>>61932731
Ok but price? Chart?

61933029
its funny seeing the same fudders unleashing their pent up vitriol day in day out fudding their own shitcoin after all these years, brain damaged cucks lmao. You retards were smug yourselves, wasted 2 bull markets in a row being all uppity and keeping le normies out xddd, should have bought some other shitcoins and not sat on your asses hahaha maybe then you wouldnt waste your life f5'ing this dead board to cry about link (the same token that makes up 90+% of your portfolio because you're a dumb poorfaggot who has 0 clue how to make money)

61933088
>>61932522
yes

61933115
>>61933029
Nice essay but adem won

61934197
>>61933088
checked, but if you say yes then you are auto included in that 10%

61934242
money talks

61934584
>>61932086
correct. the boyscouts tried to dish it out, but they sure as hell can't take it

all talk, no walk

their hubris was their downfall
>>61932295

look at how low energy you are bro. you have no material, you have no gains, you have no confidence

take that L like a man

61934590
>>61932558
>Fuddies know the second Link crosses $1,000 they will immediately be hunted and tortured across the globe.


i would pay to see one of you awkward losers try to hire a hitman in real life. if by some miracle you even managed to contact one of these groups, i imagine they'd look you over, make sure no one was around, and just take your money and then disappear

at which point you'd have no other option other than to to back to larping as a badass online

61935620
take the L, stinkbots

61936147
>>61934590
>well they'll never find my suicidal porn blog entries or notice my simping after niggerdick on x
>well they'll never find out that I'm a third worlder who dropped out of business school to join a mlm scam company that got busted
>well they'll never find out what I look like
>well they'll never message people I know
>well they'll just forget I sold my stack for wormhole and linksol and that I got irrevocably fucked as a result

You thought all of those things at one stage, now everyone including you knows how incredibly incredibly retarded you are... but dw I'm sure that
>well nothing will ACTUALLY happen when some mentally ill new millionaires target me for sport

Will totally hold and you'll be perfectly fine lil fella

61938160
>>61931684
Agreed. Endless "partnerships" and paid pilots ending up providing price feeds. The entire token has zero purpose outside inserting a fee and does nothing solution wise. It doesn't even make sense but the cult of followers just ignore this and never even argue against it and act like it is getting exposure to the core product success of the company. I seriously have no idea how they can be like this if they legitimately aren't paid shills.

item.title: Alright fine, you guys got me — 14 replies — 56.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Alright fine, you guys got me

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-03-05 05:22 UTC

OP

I made some money off this shit when it went from 4 cents to 12 cents last year, but I was wise and dumped it at 12 cents. But the tech spoke to me, I just knew the timing was bad. I took another look after hearing some rumblings about it and saw that they have a real L2 now and the git is still going. Also, let’s be honest, jews stay winning these days. So I’m back in. Also this shits on kraken now thank god so I don’t have to mess with awful MEXC anymore. I can set up a daily buy and not worry about it. Imagine if a few thousand people do this eventually.

Early replies (first 3)

61937909
>>61937890
KAS is on Kraken now? Nice.
I like Kaspa tech and mined it for a while when it was around $0.09-$0.12
What market cap can it reach?

61937919
>>61937890
I didn't know KAS was on Kraken. I like the tech and I even mined it when it was cheap. How high we going lads?

61937931
Damn pissrael must really need money for their war machine to be shilling this dead shitcoin. What's next? Bancor?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61937945
>>61937890
>>61937909
>>61937919
good morning SAAAARRSSSS Indian ranjeets have not contributed anything to the world ever lower than dung

61937962
>>61937945
lol fuck jeets. They’ve ruined the internet. I’m just a good ole boy from murica. I been in crypto since 2013; made a shit load of money on monero in 2015 and doge in 2014. Getting similar vibes from kaspa.

>>61937919
I mean if we’re dreaming, pic

61938028
>>61937962
>>61937890
based. kaspa is the *only* cypherpunk coin next to btc and xmr in the top 100. I challenge anyone to find non-vc infested undervalued crypto these days

61938035
>>61938028
Zcash? I’m pro KAS but don’t have much money right now. I hope to reach $10K with a murad meme and flip into KAS to get to $100K. KAS is a guaranteed play with quantum marketing next time crypt runs

61938038
Hard fork

61938058
>>61938035
yes zec also qualifies but i like kaspa's tech more

61938070
>>61938058
Israelis are on a generational run I will invest for sure

61938108
>>61938070
king

61938146
>>61937919
hello dear , what marketcaps can this nice tech going ?

61938154
I bought 1200 only cuz I can on kraken that’s it screw you jews

61938204
>>61937890
It was funny when i shilled here at the kyspa tines on 0.4cents, now its just benchod....

item.title: Can we have an honest conversation about why LINK isn't gaining value despite all the integrations? — 23 replies — 54.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Can we have an honest conversation about why LINK isn't gaining value despite all the integrations?

Open thread • Replies: 23 • Updated: 2026-03-05 05:04 UTC

OP

Can we have an honest conversation about why LINK isn't gaining value despite all the integrations? Without the shitflinging?

Early replies (first 3)

61934637
>>61934589
>without shitflinging
Because it is an actual digital cult.
>why isn't it gaining value
Because it is already overvalued by 95%
It also has no use.

61934902
Your time will come with all the other chosen coins.

61934977
>>61934589
You should know by now that honest discussion of link is no longer possible in this shit heap board...just hold and wait

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61934995
>>61934589
>Without the shitflinging?
We can't because any discussion of poor performance results in the cult attacking you as a fudder.

61935007
My gut tells me it will literally rocket up to $5,000 in one big fat green dildo within a 30 minute time frame. There are very few people who know about Link and even fewer in the broader normal faggot population that understand the change that is happening financially with all the bullshit happening in the world financially and otherwise. So I think there needs to be a violent re-pricing to wake everyone up in crypto about what’s happening which will then spill out into the normal faggot sphere that there’s a new financial system booting up and giving people some hope about the future since everyone is drowning now. I just can’t see Link going up 3x every year and absorbing it all while people are on a knife’s edge now.

61935008
>>61934637
>>61934995
peeeeeel oooooo peeel it so good

61935048
>>61934589
money talks

61935068
>>61934589
It's simple. It's a shitcoin. Shitcoins are short sold by whales to keep the prices down so they can acoooomuluate.
They can short the prices endlessly because shitcoins have low liquidity.
Which means they can short the prices down to their own buy orders which act as support, liquidate any logs to fill their buy orders, then close the short to short squeeze any other short sellers who didn't take profit and will act as a catalyst for the move up to make their long positions winners.

This is how shitcoins work. Especially if they're overvalued.

61935144
>>61935007
that's precisely why i've been holding 9 years

61935259
>>61935007
I will be vindicated.

61935273
>>61935144
checked. you are not alone bro.we're tired but we're tired together.

61935289
>>61934589
>honest conversation about link
>in current year + 14
Not possible. This place is beyond compromised now. I say this as somebody who has never stank a single lank.

61935339
Shilling and fudding on this board is inconsequential

61935363
>>61935273
it's weird but i'm not tired, I just feel nothing... it feels like i bought yesterday, 2017 feels like it was like 2 months ago...it's kinda weird though, but still I ain't sellin and i'll be holding until link is acknowledged by this retarded market

61935518
pain and misery :} they are your only friends...

61935536
>>61935273
>DUUUUUDE I AM SO TIRED RIGHT FELLOW OG HOLDERS hehe

61935553
>>61935536
replace 'tired' with 'gay' and it all starts to make sense

61937539
>>61934589
It isn't gaining value because the market is truly fucked. We're going through tarriff > war > tarriff > war rinse and repeat. In a weird way, the "Crypto President" is simply delaying the inevitable control grid that is to come. Chainlink is as inevitable as the control grid. But it will take time for the powers-that-be to get their shit together. This bitch knows
https://x.com/TuckerCarlson/status/2027443690629701759

61937689
>>61934589
If you show yourself to be more than a 1pbtid, I will write up an effortpost.

61937999
>>61937539
basically, it's all trump's fault (as usual)

61938011
>>61934995
/thread

61938166
>>61934589
It is because the token has zero purpose. It is not a core service efficiency increaser, it is not a problem solving technology, it is just a randomly minted token used as a toll booth token. It is not exposure to the core service success of CLL, it is just something they sell on retail to fund raise and jewishly insert to try to entrench a rent seeking model into the tech that developed to kill all rent seeking. It is very retarded.

61938170
>>61934995
This
>>61935144
>>61935259
>>61935007
SWIFT said they were more than 15 years from even having a preliminary model. By this time, the technology will be totally obsolete and consortium trust will be massively unnecessary and even if it were successful it doesn't really meaningfully impact token holders or translate to price increases at all.

item.title: hello >chuckle "business and finance", I have bad news and good news for you. — 7 replies — 28.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
hello >chuckle "business and finance", I have bad news and good news for you.

Open thread • Replies: 7 • Updated: 2026-03-05 05:17 UTC

OP

hello
>chuckle
"business and finance",
I have bad news and good news for you.
The bad news is all previous crypto narratives and meta are dead and are not coming back. Proof of work, smart contracts, forks, hashrate, memecoins, nfts, wizard shit...none of it is returning to pump any previous bags except for Bitcoin and maybe BNB. Pumpamentals don't really exist as the theories don't really span across different coins. None of the previously accepted fundamentals were relevant to price and never will be.

The good news is there is a way out. A new meta forming, if you will. And I, PENIS MAN am here to give information on it. I know you probably don't want to hear this (especially from a penis), but there is no ticker to shill and there is nothing to buy. But remember when Bitcoin could not be bought?

A major element of this whole thing you need to understand is that every crypto up until this point suffers from major distribution problems. I suppenis this was fine in the beginning, but it pretty much means any newly launched shitcoin is DOA at this point.

Can anyone guess at what the potential solutions are? I can reveal the answers in due time but I'm genuinely curious if anyone else knows. Who knows maybe I'm just a penis and don't really know anything

Early replies (first 3)

61938002
>>61938000
checked
well would you look at that?

61938090
>>61938000
The truth is people only use this board as a social validation tool, so cryptocurrency is a strong base for that retardation because of the get rich quick high volatility aspect of it. The irony in people using high speed fiber optics and edge computing to post about how decentralization is the only thing that matters should open your eyes enough. might as well change business and finance to crypto and crackheads while they're at it

61938114
>>61938090
I think you're right though at the same time I think people are leaving the herd and coming around to the idea that "crypto" as they knew it no longer exists and in many ways never existed in the way they thought. Therefore people are looking for the next thing. The next thing is crypto-native, but the days of goomblers just attempting to buy (or run an exe lol) early and profiting solely by virtue of being early are over.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61938123
the new shitcoins are polymarket gambling, but you retards are too dumb to play that game, nobody cares about eth and solana shitcoins anymore

61938134
>>61938123
That's just literal gambling though. It's not novel, it's just a modern re-expression of legacy gambling. Catered perfectly to the deepest technomodern sensibilities of degenerate goomblers.

61938175
>>61938134
it actually is novel since it allows for creation of fleeting value, and it's only going to get crazier with the tokenization of everything including personal lives, imagine being able to bet on crazy things like your neighbour being late or that he didn't take a dump today, etc that sort of thing will now be possible

61938191
>>61938175
That and assassination markets and other crazy shit

item.title: Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy — 78 replies — 67.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy

Open thread • Replies: 78 • Updated: 2026-03-05 04:21 UTC

OP

Reminder even 100 million NW is not generational wealth worthy

Early replies (first 3)

61931291
This is just a coon who doesn't understand investments and compounding returns.

61931302
>>61931288
Probably bought a bunch of houses and cars that he couldn't afford the maintenance and taxes on

61931311
>>61931302
>>61931291
>>61931288
He's right though

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61933005
>>61931288
Why are you faggots obsessed with "generational" wealth? Even if you raise your children perfectly, it is only a matter of a few generations down the line before they become decadent and lose your fortune. At most just provide them a beater car, a starter house, and pay for their education.

61933411
>>61931288
they could give him 100 billion and he'd still go bankrupt
funny how you only see this with blacks, everyone else seems to have little issue managing money

61934349
>>61933005
>just let all the other groups that hate you have wealth and status bro

61934356
>>61931967
you can't read?

61934424
>>61933005
Black people love catchy sayings like "generational wealth", especially TV blacks. They get any kind of money and recognition and then they want to larp as Malcom X for some reason, even if they still do nigga shit like having baby mommas and getting arrested.

61934468
>>61932022

Rookies also go through a league mandated financial education class to help prevent the bankruptcies. Just really hard to get someone in the USA to understand temporality

61934564
>>61932553
Theres 8 billion niggas on earth
There are probably 10 million boomers worth over 1 million in california alone because of their houses they bought in the 90s at a quarter of the current valuation

61934569
>>61931288
But a Bieber BBC BJ is priceless

61934572
>>61934349
the shitmigrants around me definitely dont have generational wealth,,, theyre more of a nuisance .....

61934605
aren't there like black wealth managers or family offices for these retards in some place like atlanta, it would be a good way to get rich

61934641
>>61931311
oh man only $12 million a year, how do these poor oppressed black men survive on so little? with such tiny paychecks you won't even have any money left to invest after paying your bills

61934654
Most people don't know how to adjust after living like this. He's getting paid 20M a year, and he isn't going to be paid 20M a year for long. Even if he invests it well, he still isn't going to go back to 20M a year.

61934927
>>61931288
>niggerball player is bad with money, can't survive on a measly $100 million
This is why white people need to pay reparations. There are millions of niggers just like this in this country living hand to mouth because of racism. How is little Jayquerius expected to afford his malt liquor and hennessy in these conditions?

61937100
>>61934424
But here it is mostly white men who want to give the ideal trad upbringing to their children and make it possible several generations forward without relying on the evil pozzed world too much and for that they need a gajillion dollars.
The trvthpill here is that it is a game of chance. Every generation is a roll of the dice. Just do your best to raise your own family and don't try to plan 10 generations ahead.

61937293
>>61931302
>>61931362
Yup. To blow that much money they:

>Pay off debts of vaguely related friends and family
>Buy friends and family cars and other bling
>Stupidly big properties
>Loads of super cars
>Take an entourage to da club
>Hookers and blow

It's not to say $12M a year isn't a lot of money. But supporting a stupidly large lifestyle for 20 people going all out is only barely feasible for that.

If you just lived with your family and had a nice property or three and went to a nice wine store for your Dom Perignon and took yourself and the missus out to three star Michelin restaurants and flew first/business class and paid for housekeepers and gardeners and an assistant and bought a Patek for yourself and the lady once a year you totally could.

61937296
>>61931288
You have to be a genuine dumbass to be able to spend that amount of money

61937513
>>61931288
he deserves permanent debt

61937521
That is what happens when you don't live frugally and spend it all. All he had to do was live in a million dollar shit box in the nice neighborhood, go on an occasional vacation and send his kids through college. He would have spent only 5 million at most in his lifetime. Maybe 10 million if he had a bunch of emergency expenses. 10 generations of wealth right there not counting for inflation.

61937541
>>61937521
a) Darkies can't even plan ten minutes ahead, let alone twenty years.
b) I believe what >>61932636 said where sportsball leagues intentionally encourage players to be lavish and short-term in focus as a means of control; a player who's financially secure is in a position to dictate terms to the team/league. A player who's one missed paycheque away from insolvency isn't.

61937542
>>61937100
I see, you're responding to OPs comment, not example.
The real answer is because his comment was a shitpost and the real purpose of this thread is to laugh at low IQ pro athletes, I don't think this board is actually obsessed with generational wealth. A lot of guys here just like to imagine what ifs, like what if they ever had a family and were the monopoly man.

61937562
>>61933005
It's the illusion of stability. It especially makes sense for black people. White sons from the top quintile are like 80% likely to stay in in the top quintile. Black sons are only 20% likely, they almost always end up less successful than their parents. So, it makes sense for those parents to want to shore up their chances, since the system seems stacked against them.
But it really is a betrayal of the American ethos. Outcomes for white boys should be more like those of black boys, as an equal share of each quintile ending up in each quintile would be indicative of a true meritocracy. Most people don't seem to understand that, when they say that they want generational wealth, they're saying they want aristocracy.

61937567
>>61934605
It's just a coincidence that there don't seem to be enough of them.

61937570
>>61937542
Those two things aren't mutually exclusive and both are actually helpful if the true emotional goal is coping without actually changing anything about their own lives. Mindless fantasizing and punching down on perceived inferiors, perfect ingredients for a Copium and Tonic.

61937571
>>61937567
this is like saying if we built more libraries then these people would become more literate

61937575
>>61937521
If you had 55mill(post taxes) and literally lost all of it to the point of not even having a property you have to have had maximum idiotic decision making.
Maximized credits
Gifting money that you aren't getting back
Buying multiple depreciating resources
Extremely expensive alcohol and food every day
Paying double for jewellry worksmanship over material for bling
Hookers and blow maxxing every day

That said nigga probably lived all he had to live already

61937720
>>61937575
Hookers? He would have had fans who would have sex with him for free. Marry one that would be reliable for taking care of the home if not already married like most athletes do.

61937745
>>61932058
>Billie eyelash
What's wrong with her finances?

61937749
>>61937720
Kinda jelly though I only have a bit over 1m after full liquidation I know I can live tightly indefinitely with that but indefinitely won't last through a bad market crash with that but with about double I don't see how that could happen

61937766
>>61937571
Yes.
But also, it's just a coincidence.

61938098
>>61937766
how, because jews are the majority? or because they don't want their wealth managed by outsiders, considering that people they look up to like lebron and michael jordan obviously have their wealth maanged.

item.title: This wagie has escaped — 47 replies — 31.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
This wagie has escaped

Open thread • Replies: 47 • Updated: 2026-03-05 04:01 UTC

OP

I did it anons. I escaped the wagie cage, work offered me a redundancy thinking i would say no and ask to be redployed in another shitty role.
The HR roastie was visibly shaken. "But anon, the market is tough right now!" After 15 years i have paid off all debt and saved plus will be 200k after tax redundancy.

After selling my house, this will give me enough to retire in SEA. Fuck waging.

Early replies (first 3)

61933494
>>61933477
kek

61933581
>>61933477
The Light abandons no man

61933627
>>61933477
>retire in SEA
ehhhhhhhhhh

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61935462
>>61933477
You sound like a two digits IQ idealistic faggot but I admire your balls.
t. 44 years old NEET self-sustained god that has been neeting since his early twenties

61935470
I have like 2m and still feel poor

61935590
>>61933477
Fuck you cock sucker motherfucker AAAAGGGGGHHHHHHHH

61935647
>>61933725
In Eastern Europe? Fucking retard you can buy a $30k commie apartment and live with $800 per month and your propriety will also grow in value over time and I'm not talking some shithole like Moldova where having $500 in your pocket makes you rich.
Why the fuck are you paying $1500 per month to live in SEA and live with browns? That will turn into $2000 soon then $2500 and so on.

61935688
>>61935647
where in eastern europe?

61935716
>>61935647
Do they really let foreigners buy in those places?
Will they give me citizenship?
Are all those countries full of sociopathic emotionless corrupt people like Russians?

61935721
>>61933477
Congrats on the escape. I hope I can too but for now I’m happy some anon has freed themselves.

61935822
>>61933866
best advice in this thread
>>61933899
Check out a few different places around the world before you decide to commit to just one.
With over a million you can easily dump it into dividend/income focused ETFs and retire to a modest life pretty much anymore you want. SEA is selling yourself short.

61935846
>>61935716
>noooo people aren't smiling for no reason all the time, they're literally insane
You're not fit to live with slavs, stick to Latin America

61935869
>>61935647
lol dipshit, does all your knowledge of russia come from /pol/ and fox jews?
Every intelligent russian with money is fleeing that shithole and telling people in the west about how fucking horrible and utter shit it was, meanwhile you have turbo virgins who spend all their time crying on the internet and sucking trump's dick trying to convince you it's some white paradise.
I hope you migrate over there and get raped by an arab or central asian mongoloid.

61936723
You will love it... till you don't know what to do next. And then you'll start a bar (and usually fail like many farangs), find that you are out of money and you'll be worried what else to do
till you will be back to work.

61936931
>>61936723
There’s so many ass blasted cucks here. What do you think all the thirdies taking all the jobs do when they work in America? They send the money back home and then leave the country when they have enough to be rich and retire over there. Heaven forbid an American who actually worked for his money leaves

61936945
>>61933862
1mill is made it point for me at like lowest of standards I'd accept so yeah thats it enjoy

61937074
>>61936945
He’s not planning on living in America retard.

61937111
>>61933725
>>61933844
Thats 13 years worth of poverty wages anon. You're gonna have a bad time. Unless you plan to put it in a high yield divvy stock or savings acct and live off the interest.

61937117
>>61933862
Oh ok. Plus a mill I mean sure yeah, go nuts. Living off the interest not principal is still a good idea though. You can live like a kang... in America even in one of the poorer states, off that kind of scratch.

61937202
>>61933477
How do you even retire in sea? Won't you get scammed there?

61937294
>>61937074
Yeah with 1mill im not affording america anhwhere not that theres anything to afford here since its all shit

61937302
>>61935688
NTA, but $1500 is close to median pay in Poland after taxes.

61937315
>>61937302
What east europe places are safe to live in when you have 15k worth of electronics

61937321
>>61937202
What im wondering is how hes planning to stay there. I personally would move to sk permanently but visas are a thing. I only got eu/us nationality

61937357
>>61937315
Poland's pretty safe nowadays.

61937362
There's a bit of seething on here from the usual suspects, but thank you to the anons who support my mission live free of the zog

61937422
>>61933477
I admire your balls anon. I feel like living there would make you a target. Maybe get a guard dog.

61937534
>>61937362
Good on you escaping the cage

61937556
>>61935869
>Every paid leftist and ukrainian shill is fleeing that shithole and telling people in the west about how fucking horrible and utter shit it was,
Only paid shills would tell you this. Be careful.
> central asian mongoloid.
Don't move to Uzbekistan.

61937558
>>61933725
>>61933831
Congrats anon for escaping the cage hell, and HR roasties.

61937566
>>61933873
you better have low standards or really be open minded ,dont be an asshole to locals, good luck

61938048
>>61937294
There's plenty of places in America where you can live indefinitely off 1M. I probably live off $30K / yr and I waste money like crazy. Do you really want to be in a crowded, foreign country when shit hits the fan, OP?

61938066
>>61933477
>retire in SEA

Ya blew it

item.title: Anyone else getting the itch? — 99 replies — 25.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Anyone else getting the itch?

Open thread • Replies: 99 • Updated: 2026-03-05 01:38 UTC

OP

The big boys'll go back up, that's guaranteed money. But some others will 10x, 100x, 1000x. I'm feelin' like it's SHIB's turn.

Early replies (first 3)

61900851
>>61899833
Checked

61900872
>>61899833
I'll just keep buying small amounts of it for the rest of my life, and see what happens.

61900948
>>61899833
i believe in shib

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61922734
No one is buying toad in a shib thread! Shib is going to 14x to ath and toad will go to zero. Shib already has an etf coming and toad has desperate curry flavored shills. LMAO!

61923250
>>61922734
When toad moons YOU'RE going to seethe, when toad moons YOU'RE going to rope!

61923260
>>61899833
I am in anon, people are too stupid to skip this one.
And some Doge in case the elom makes a comeback.

61924787
>>61922734
See
>>61922014

61926036
>>61899833
This thread smells like curry and shit.

Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.

61926122
>>61926036
>This thread smells like curry and shit.
So like most threads on /biz ?

>>61926036
>Also, shibaggies holding their shibags to zero.
Sure buddy. The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!

61927655
>>61926122
>The number 1 meme on eth is going to zero goy!
i'm genuinely considering dumping the rest of what i hold because of this post

61927803
>>61927655
Checked dump it

61927812
>>61899833
you will be lucky to get a 3x

61927816
>>61927812
Shib is ez 10x bear case 33x bull case

61927892
>>61927816

61928058
>>61927892
>Shib will never go to a place it’s been before because it just won’t.
You sound tarded bro

61928094
>>61928058
It only went there because of insane hype and FOMO. It will never happen again unless Elon makes it the official currency of X or something

61928421
>>61927655
Please do fud chud. I like cheapies.
>>61927812
>>61928094
He didn't buy cheap before the etf and clarity act passed.
>NGMI!

61929970
> shib niggers in this thread ignoring the most obvious 1000-3000x token right in front of them

61931432
>>61929970
Its no use anon. These people like being poor. Sit back and hodl and wait for the fireworks.

61931717
Shib is positive returns for evm daily trade bots. Over 60% positive returns. So far they’re all trading at above 50% positive returns for bot trading. What ever happened to shiba sex? Still a general.

61931779
This thread makes me so happy, I thought all my Shibros had abandoned /biz/ forever...we're back in full force!

61932425
While retards in the chat slurping a shitcoin that’s already over 5 years olde, the smart money is dropping at least .2 eff on toad, just sitting back watching the drama unfold

61934414
50x

61934942
it begins...

61935122
Toads invade shib threads because its a zero volume zero interest and zero attention, its been a shit coin since early 2023. 1.9k holders that want to kys. Lol, lmao even.

61935440
>>61931779
SHIB blessing thread anon still here, i'm still here waiting for the time and it's going to happen

61936417
>>61935122
No u. Toad holders are going to make it.

61936442
my itch is on cheese, already bottomed only upwards from here

61936453
>>61936442
No fuck off with that jeet scam. Toad is not a jeet scam it's an Israeli/US government scam.

61937292
>>61899833
Luna never got a crack last time

61937454
>>61899833
I own $10,000 worth of Shib and that pile of shit isn't going anywhere.
Once is goes 25% up I'm dumping it asap.

61937481
>>61937454

>once is goes

61937662
>>61937454

item.title: Every normie in the world is buying stocks right now. — 31 replies — 20.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
Every normie in the world is buying stocks right now.

Open thread • Replies: 31 • Updated: 2026-03-05 04:01 UTC

OP

Every normie in the world is buying stocks right now. And they are all in some basket of Mag7 + 1-2 US midcap of choice. That's it.

Early replies (first 3)

61937097
I also very commonly see my Uber drivers checking their Robinhood or Binance account when waiting behind a red light.
Trust me, look out for this sign yourself.

61937110
Yeah I realized that too and it has me spooked. I realized I only got into shit in 2020 when I suddenly had time and money to research it. I remember last summer some little intern bitch at the bank I used to work at talking to some fat black chick who insisted that XRP was going to 5 dollars (no clue why ever fucking idiot is always attracted to XRP) and her zoomer friend with the broccoli hair talking about how he invested 10 bucks in efferiumz and had made like a 10 dollar profit or something like it was amazing, which was funny because at the time I had a 20,000 dollar unrealized profit on -some shitcoin. Made me afraid that we're near the top and penniless retards are getting All In with their less than 100 dollar investment accounts. I did enjoy randomly flipping stocks on my phone on my breaks at that job. Felt good to be making less than 200 bucks a day (that job paid shit) and then sell some shit for 1200 bucks and feel like a bigshot while driving home.

61937203
>>61937097
Let me guess, its not crypto.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61937211
>they are all in some basket of Mag7 + 1-2 US midcap of choice
So literally VOO

61937217
>>61937110
>xrp attracting retards
Literally never fails, they’re all on the crypto scam side of YouTube where some 85iq 45 year old rambles on about schizo bullshit

61937220
>>61937110
>>61937217
BOOOOOOOOOOOOOOM

61937227
>>61937211
It used to be
>US stock etf + some international etf + bonds
Then it was
>S&P500 etf
Now people only handpick individual stocks.
>Some tech stocks and a random lesser known one that they heard hype about

61937254
>>61937227
I only do VOO and bitcoin. I’m kind of exhausted with chasing hype.

61937265
>>61937254
Literally everyone in the world has piled into the S&P500 at this point. Do you have some international at all?

61937298
>>61937265
Yeah, no. Would rather go down with the ship than send money overseas to make some money.

61937303
the trend is only going to go up. you're using old world logic. every kid born in the past 20 years has a smartphone in their mouth to teeth with and as they grow up an get jobs they have instant access to real time data and investing tools no gen prior had which means every nanosecond another wave of investors aping into the markets and making the trend line go up. face it your edgelord doom and gloom views don't work anymore. you're not a unique snowflake with some inside track nobody else has. you're investing in rugpull memes and will lose all your money while normies make 20% apy MINIMUM. And compounds. they get rich you get poor and dumb. you're a victim of your own self inflected and delusional belief of superiority

61937306
>>61937298
Or you can invest overseas and later sell to take away profits from there to the US

61937325
>>61937072
This is why the retail investing success my gen x parents enjoyed won't be possible for me, especially with the eventual rise of individual trading AI. Also the make it amount keeps increasing the more and more people make it. It's over

61937327
>>61937110
I know right. Reminds me of my shoe polisher. Nigger couldn't shut his mouth for 5 seconds about bitcoin. Talking about how it would go to 1,000,000+ dollars because it was digital gold and that it was bullish that Epstein funded developers and invested in Blockstream and Bitcoin.

One thing was weird though and I didn't knew it at that time. But he said that Bitachon = trust in Hebrew and that BTC is also trust. He then started saying that many jews, like David Chaum, for example were pioneers in these digital currencies because for their Mosiach (Antichrist for Christians) to arrive, there has to be no more psychical cash.
He then continued that Epstein claimed in his email that XRP is a competitor and thus the shoe polisher hated XRP also.

Made me afraid that BTC will never go beyond 100k again because all the retards are buying like 0.001 BTC. I did enjoy randomly shorting Chainlink on my phone sitting on the beach with my Margarita.

61937331
>>61937303
ok boomer

61937339
>>61937303
If all those normies "get rich", none of them will be however. Rich is a relative thing.

61937340
>>61937227
Nobody above room temp iq fell for the international or bond memes

61937350
https://fred.stlouisfed.org/series/BOGZ1FL153064486Q

61937355
>>61937339
no they will all be rich because they're doing the bare minimum which is have a stable job and invest this is something memetards will fail to do as they continue to falsely believe they have some inside edge in spite of the fact they can't even hold a job or take good advice. they are part of the same folks who are simply belligerent and choose to spend all their time and money on drugs, partying, gambling and the like

61937364
>>61937254
Go to bed grandpa. Make sure you sell the goy gold if you get one last pump above 100k

61937368
>>61937355
I'm not going to argue about the state of /biz/nessmen, but if everyone is doing the bare minimum that just leads to more inflation and a new baseline. Previous generations used to invest more in real estate, so if you went in stocks it wasn't such a big deal. Now no one can afford to buy houses and everyone is in stocks. The only way to reset the baseline is a crash big enough that enough volume will get shaken out for years. The next 2008 tier stock crash can't come soon enough, unfortunately even a full AI correction probably won't be big enough to generate that result.

61937698
>>61937368
>everyone
m8 the baseline is way lower than you think. there are way more investors today than ever in human history. that doesn't mean there isn't still an unfathomable amount of clueless cattle ripe for exploitation. both statements are true. more investors exist every day thus allowing investments to continue growing while simultaneously unfathomable amounts of stupid poor people will always exist can't force a horse to drink blahblah

61937763
>>61937364
I’ll probably outperform you over several decades by an order of magnitude. Best of luck, anon.

61937770
>>61937072
Most people in the world are old and technologically illiterate, they rely on investment firms (also full of the elderly) to handle their money for them. We're, inexplicably, still early.

61937771
>>61937298
That's the most NPC thing I've read this week, I think you're serious

61937776
>>61937771
I don’t want to invest in Europe or China. I think most companies outside of the US or Japan are ass and I don’t want to give them my money.

61937795
>>61937327
>all the retards are buying like 0.001 BTC
Same as it ever was

61937826
>>61937298
based.

61937833
Most normies in my experience are absolutely terrified of investing. They don't see it as any different to going to the casino.

61937865
>>61937350
yikes i might transition to bonds soon

61938064
>>61937097
Man this is demoralization as heck, how can there still be tons of normies with bags when we are down so badly from ATH and alts at ATLs….

I guess btc still needs to go down to 30k and stocks I am guessing a 30-40% retrace

item.title: Day 1650 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M — 34 replies — 16.8/hr

61927063

n
a
i
l

61927377

crapto is dead

61932537
>>61927483

61932568

61932603

61932661

61933340

item.title: "Networking" is a waste of time — 50 replies — 12.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
"Networking" is a waste of time

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-03-05 01:26 UTC

OP

> If you try to network with the rich, they'll laugh at you and go back to their ballgame "DON'T TALK ABOUT WORK PLEASE!"
> Try to network within your friends or family, "Yeah sure I know such and such and they'll let you know!" and you never hear anything back again
> Go to job fairs; "THANK YOU FOR YOUR RESUME! *shakes your hand* YOU CAN APPLY ONLINE AT WWW....NEXT!!!"

Where's the REAL advice on how to make money for once, outside of the memes "get a job" (which btw there are no real entry level jobs anymore) or "just gamble bro" (and end up in the 90%+ lost money statistic).

Sigh.

Early replies (first 3)

61930524
>>61930491
You join forces with other 4channers at a meetup in Miami.

61930527
>>61930491
true

61930539
>>61930491
anon, networking is a euphemism for "sucking cock". You want a job but have little to no experience? go to a bingo night for the elderly. Find the most homosexual old boomer faggot you can find and flirt with him. Be clear adn direct: I'll suck your cock for a job or penetrate you at your whim. Please. Then you land the job. You never noticed Bingo nights are full of 20 year old femboys flirting with old men. Of coarse not, you won't be asking retarded questions about networking here otterwise

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61932389
>>61931936
No one on 4chan is your friend. Anyone you "meet" here is a glownigger who wants to rape you and throw you in federal prison for the rest if your life so they can pin some shit on you that you simply cannot defend against.
This is not the place for making friends, it's the place for exchanging ideas and pondering things.

61932435
>>61930491
Are you ugly?

61932468
Networking is just making friends dumbass. You don’t try to network, your network emerges naturally

61932475
join the masons

61932476
>>61930491
"networking" is just non drug addicts exchanging phone numbers and complimenting each other's chubby wives

61932478
>>61932389
why would a glownigger bother trying to pin shit on a bunch of broke NEETs and send them to prison?

61932680
>>61932478
Because entry level glowniggers need to nail someones ass to prove their worth. Like how spartans had to kill a slave without getting caught, only legalistic.

61932690
>>61930491
networking is the business term for making friends. just be a human and talk to people, dont be needy and expect things from others.

61932775
>>61932680
Most retarded shit I have ever read

61932941
>>61932690
This. "Networking" is just me calling my buddies who are also in software and asking if their work is hiring when I am looking for a new job. They slip my resume in to the boss man past HR, and they get a nice bonus when I get hired. Which I will because I'm also actually good.

61932944
>>61930491
Rich people are just a bunch of retard that waste money in cocaine

61932961
>>61930630
>How to Speedrun The Downfall of Western Civilization

61932998
>>61932389
>This is not the place for making friends
Maybe not for a faggot like you

61933006
>>61932998
>>61932389
Some of my oldest and best friends are from 4chan. Granted, it is a different place these days.

61933012
>>61930491
>If you try to network with the rich, they'll laugh at you and go back to their ballgame "DON'T TALK ABOUT WORK PLEASE!"
You don't understand what networking is.

61933013
>>61933006
There are still a lot of younger people attracted to 4chan for some reason. If you enjoy having friends that might be a decade younger than you they're out there and willing to meet. Just don't bother with /soc/, bunch of homos and retards.

61933089
>>61932775
Whatever man, it's your ass if they're on that shit.

61933121
>>61930630
>Be an Indian who always has energy for endless bullshit but never the spirit to build/innovate
Response is fake but reflects reality. This is how boomers hire and why we're being replaced.

61933152
>>61933013
Nah I stick to the blue boards. /soc/ is fuckin gross.

61933171
>>61930630
>If you don't finish the event energised, at least a dozen business cards in your hand
but i'm always tired, depressed, and i hate to socialize :(

61933249
The networking advice they give to high school and college kids is hilarious. Nobody wants to "network" with some nameless fungible newbie. If you're starting from zero and don't have some kind of edge like a rich uncle or a gigachad face, then networking means befriending other entry level people and keeping up with them so they'll remember you after they move to a new company and get promoted. It takes years, even decades to pay off. If you're lucky you might also impress a manager who will let you ride his coattails as he moves up the corporate ladder, but don't count on that.

61933294
>>61932680
What the fuck is wrong with you

61933544
>>61933294
I am reasonably well seasoned, my (merited) fear of spooks keeps me from doing sketchy shit, like meeting complete and total strangers off of 20th century German literature forums.

Didn't you parents ever tell you not to meet up with strangers off the internet?

61933551
>>61933544
The first time I met people from 4chan it was to get drunk deep inna woods and shoot at dirt with a bunch of firearms. I'm still alive.

61933577
>>61933551
What, 20 years ago before feds and every other bad actor started lingering here looking for someone to exploit like a nigger hanging outside a gas station late at night?

I treat people here like I treat people at work. At arms length. I'll talk with you, but I absolutely do not want to hang out outside of here and I DEFINITELY don't want you knowing my personal business/details. That's how you get murdered and raped.

61933662
>>61933577
Yeah over 15 years ago anyway.

61933702
>>61930491
Join the military and die for Israel

61936871
>>61930957
SEE YOU AT THE BIG PARTY REDDIT

61936887
>>61930491
So why not just build your own business instead? There's safe stock today printing free money on polymarket like betting on no ayy lmaos and no jesus coming back. Work is just a bandaid it won't get you anywhere unless you picked doctor

61937637
>>61931535
>I mean literally for business
I would be down to meet up to get drunk and talk about anime but I would never do business with anyone on this website because a) You're all retards, and b) Going into business together is the fastest way to stop being friends with someone.
